fields.title: [ticket-api][watcher] Add reconcile lifecycle tracing
fields.validation_summary: Added structured tracing to ticket-api reconcile_once and run_watch_loop, extracted a testable reconcile_pending_paths helper, and added focused watcher tests for UUID root detection, fallback full-scan, and targeted orphan integration. Focused watcher tests passed and full cargo test -p ticket-api passed (97 passed).
